summary: Frontend-only regression for dynamic Primary Color feature + DS migration of Settings/ProjectDetail + Create Project wizard. All critical flows PASS. Primary color reset to #3b82f6 at end.

test_results.settings_identity_tab: PASS - Identity tab renders with picker, hex input, 7 swatches, preview button, save
test_results.swatch_live_update: PASS - Clicking brand-swatch-10b981 updated --ds-primary=#10b981 and preview bg=rgb(16,185,129) immediately
test_results.hex_typing_live_update: PASS - Typing #8b5cf6 in brand-primary-color-hex immediately set --ds-primary=#8b5cf6
test_results.save_and_persistence: PASS - After Save Identity + full page reload, --ds-primary still #8b5cf6
test_results.theme_toggle: PASS - theme-toggle-btn flips html class to 'theme-light' and back; Settings Identity readable in both
test_results.wizard_loaded: PASS - /projects/new renders with wizard-next-btn + wizard-back-btn, font Geist (not monospace), full-width layout
test_results.wizard_light_mode_inputs: PASS (visual) - screenshot confirms inputs have visible borders and dark text on light bg in light mode
test_results.wizard_navigation: PASS - Navigated through all 4 steps using wizard-next-btn (Repository -> Build Config -> Domain & SSL -> Review)
test_results.project_detail_tabs: PASS - All 5 tabs present (Configuration, Metrics, History, Deploy Logs, Container Logs) and switchable
test_results.save_config_btn: PASS - save-config-btn present on Configuration tab
test_results.reset_primary_color: PASS - Reset to #3b82f6, saved, reload confirms --ds-primary=#3b82f6

critical_code_review_comments: Dynamic --ds-primary CSS var flow works cleanly across sidebar logo, active nav, preview button, and Save Identity CTA.
ProjectDetail DS migration retained all tab switching + save-config-btn functionality; no visual/functional regressions detected.
Create Project wizard is full-width DS-based and uses Geist font (confirmed via computed style).
seed_data_creation: None. Wizard flow tested via step navigation without final submit (wizard-create-btn not clicked).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Primary color feature verified end-to-end (live preview, sidebar accent, persistence across reload). Reset back to default #3b82f6 before finishing.
